steps.title: Identify the pyramid and locate its row
steps.content: The question names Tikal Temple IV and asks for its height. Find this pyramid in the Pyramid column of the table.

steps.title: Read the height value and select the match
steps.content: Tikal Temple IV's row shows 70 meters in the Height column. Choice A is the only one with this value. The other three choices show heights of the other three pyramids in the table, making them incorrect. That matches choice A — A is correct.
